body.title: CLOSED: Fix _get_logger typo in inference_gateway.py:553 (latent NameError when _t4 is None)
body.description:
Retroactive incidental ticket per workflow rule (every change has a ticket). Fixed inline during T-inference-misreport-fix sprint when test_message_distinguishes_local_only_failed (which sets gw._t4=None) hit a NameError at line 553: `_get_logger(__name__).debug(...)` — should be `get_logger` (the actual import name from igor_base at line 130). Pre-existing latent bug; only triggered when _t4 is None at this specific debug-log path, which is rare in production but surfaces as soon as cloud is unavailable. Fix: 1-character rename. Shipped in commit ed3ae6bb alongside T-inference-misreport-fix.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py:553 (renamed `_get_logger` → `get_logger`)
**Design rules:** none (typo fix)
**Scope boundary:** IN: the one-character typo. OUT: any other latent typos in the file (would be its own audit ticket).
**Test plan:** verified by tests/test_inference_gateway_misreport.py::test_message_distinguishes_local_only_failed which now passes (would have hit NameError before).
**Validation:** test passes. **Cleanup:** none. **Logging:** the fixed line itself adds the missing log.
